Bus Timings

C3 Bus Timings Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Karama Bus Station

January 8, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus C3 is a vital part of Dubai’s public transportation network, providing an efficient and reliable service between Abu Hail Bus Station · 3 and Al Karama Bus Station · 3. This route connects several key neighborhoods, educational institutions, and major landmarks, making it a convenient choice for both residents and visitors traveling across these areas.

Route Name C3
Route Description Abu Hail Bus Station · 3 - Al Karama Bus Station · 3
Total Distance Approximately 12 to 18 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 36 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 00:22 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus C3 Route in Dubai

Bus C3 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for C3 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus C3 is AED 3. This price is designed to offer a cost-effective solution for travelers, making it an affordable option whether you’re a daily commuter or just visiting Dubai.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no specific online booking option available for Bus C3. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates and to plan your journey, the RTA Dubai app provides schedule information, route maps, and live bus tracking, helping you stay informed and manage your travel plans effectively.

Bus Route

  1. Abu Hail Bus Station · 3

  2. Omer Bin Al Khattab School

  3. Sadaa School

  4. Sadaa School 2

  6. Hor Al Anz, 3

  18. Baraha, Eid Musallah

  20. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  21. Naif, Intersection

  23. Raffa

  24. Rolla

Bus C3 Station Overview

Abu Hail Bus Station · 3

Abu Hail Bus Station · 3 is a significant transit point located in the Abu Hail area, serving as a major hub for local and regional bus routes.

Its strategic location offers convenient access to nearby commercial and residential areas, making it a key node for passengers traveling within the region. The station’s amenities and its position within the bustling Abu Hail neighborhood ensure a smooth and efficient travel experience for commuters.

Intersection at Abu Hail, Masjid Al Salam 1 Bus Stop

The Abu Hail, Masjid Al Salam 1 Bus Stop serves as a crucial intersection point for multiple bus routes, including Bus Route C3 and Bus Route C28. This central location facilitates convenient transfers between these routes, enhancing connectivity for passengers traveling across various areas. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities, providing a seamless transit experience and ensuring efficient travel throughout the city.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient

Intersecting Bus Routes at Burjuman Metro Bus Stop

The Burjuman Metro Bus Stop serves as a major transit hub where several bus routes intersect, enhancing connectivity for passengers throughout Dubai. Key routes that converge at this station include 66, 67, 61D, C03, C18, F70, X23, and X25.

This central location provides seamless travel options across different city areas, making it a vital stop for commuters and ensuring efficient access to various destinations.

Al Karama Bus Station · 3

Al Karama Bus Station · 3 is a prominent bus terminal situated in the Al Karama area, known for its extensive connectivity and high passenger volume. The station provides a range of amenities to enhance the travel experience, including comfortable seating, ticketing services, and up-to-date bus schedule information.

Its central location in Al Karama facilitates easy access to local shops, services, and residential areas. This bus station plays a crucial role in managing transit for both daily commuters and visitors, offering seamless connections to various parts of Dubai.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Several notable tourist attractions and destinations are accessible along the Bus C3 route:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station External: Located near the famous Gold Souk, a traditional market renowned for its extensive collection of gold jewelry and traditional Arabic designs.

  2. BurJuman Metro Station: Close to BurJuman Mall, one of Dubai’s major shopping centers offering a wide range of retail outlets, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

3.

  1. Central Post Office: Located in the heart of Dubai, this historic building is part of the city’s heritage and provides a glimpse into Dubai’s past.

  2. Al Wasl University: While primarily an educational institution, the university is situated in a lively area with various cafes and shops.

  3. Sharaf DG Metro Station: Near to Sharaf DG, a popular electronics retailer, and other commercial outlets.

These locations provide a mix of cultural, commercial, and entertainment options, enhancing the travel experience along the Bus C3 route.

Journey Experience

Taking the C3 bus from Abu Hail Bus Station to Al Karama Bus Station offers a long but insightful journey through some vibrant parts of Dubai.

Along the way, you can catch glimpses of Al Maktoum Bridge and the Creek, which divide the older parts of Dubai from the modern business districts. Al Karama, your final stop, is famous for its lively streets, affordable shopping, and delicious food options, making it a great area to explore for both tourists and residents.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Al Karama Bus Station · 3, the furthest point on the C3 bus route starting from Abu Hail Bus Station · 3, with a price range of AED 45-54. This allows for a convenient and cost-effective way to reach the end of the route, ensuring a seamless travel experience across Dubai. Whether you’re heading to Al Karama for shopping, dining, or other activities, the app offers a reliable option for planning your journey.

This comprehensive guide to Bus C3 offers all the essential information needed to navigate Dubai’s public transport system seamlessly, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable travel experience. Whether you are commuting to work, exploring the city, or heading to a specific landmark, Bus C3 provides a reliable and convenient option. With detailed route information, frequent service, and affordable fares, you can travel with ease and confidence throughout your journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: January 8, 2026.
